calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Sep-04-2003 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day.
Commissioner Sue Kaplan, Clerks: S. Ravinantapricha/V. Mack, CSR: Leticia Perez.
Petitioner, Lori Ottersbach present in pro per, was sworn and examined.
The Court grants the petition for change of name to: Peter Lyn Ottersbach and futher orders the GENDER of Peter Lyn Ottersbach is changed: from FEMALE to MALE.
Decree signed in open court.
